description: LeadBoxer is a B2B lead intelligence platform that identifies anonymous website visitors, scores them automatically, and surfaces sales-ready opportunities.
tagline: Find and manage all your sales leads in one place
overview: LeadBoxer turns anonymous website and email engagement into identified, scored sales leads by connecting behavioral data with company profile information. Marketing and sales teams use it to qualify prospects, segment audiences, and manage opportunities from a single platform rather than stitching together multiple point tools.
what_is: LeadBoxer is a lead generation and qualification platform that helps businesses identify the people and companies engaging with their digital properties. It converts anonymous visitor activity into sales-ready leads through automated scoring and detailed company profiling, giving revenue teams a clearer picture of who is interested and how engaged they are.

The platform suits sales and marketing teams that need visitor identification, lead scoring, and lead management consolidated in one place. Value is visible quickly after implementation, with new lead insights typically surfacing as soon as the tracking is live. Faster identification of high-potential prospects translates directly into more targeted campaign activity and better use of sales capacity.

LeadBoxer connects with CRM systems, email platforms, and data enrichment tools to centralize lead records and automate handoff workflows. It is not intended to replace a full CRM or to handle complex sales process automation. Its core strength is filling the lead intelligence and qualification gap that often exists between marketing activity and sales follow-up.
